data.title: U.S. Weekly Jobless Claims Reach 223,000 in Early April
data.description: According to Odaily, the number of initial jobless claims in the United States for the week ending April 5 reached 223,000. This figure aligns with expectations and shows an increase from the previous week's count of 219,000.

data.title: U.S. Short-Term Interest Rate Futures Rise Following CPI Data Release
data.description: According to PANews, following the release of the U.S. Consumer Price Index (CPI) data, short-term interest rate futures in the United States experienced an increase. This development has led traders to intensify their bets on a potential interest rate cut by the Federal Reserve.

data.title: Grayscale Report Suggests Trade Tensions Could Boost Bitcoin Adoption
data.description:
According to PANews, Grayscale Investments, an asset management firm, released a research report on Wednesday indicating that tariffs and trade tensions may positively impact Bitcoin (BTC) adoption in the medium term. The report highlights that increased tariffs can lead to economic stagflation, characterized by stagnant economic growth and inflation, which negatively affects traditional assets but benefits scarce commodities like gold. Trade tensions might exert pressure on the demand for dollar reserves, creating opportunities for competitive assets such as other fiat currencies, gold, and Bitcoin.

Historical precedents suggest that a weak dollar and above-average inflation could persist, potentially benefiting Bitcoin in such a macroeconomic environment. The report also notes that "rapid improvements in market structure, supported by changes in U.S. government policy," could help expand the investor base for Bitcoin.

data.title: Before the release of the US CPI, the probability that the Federal Reserve will keep interest rates unchanged in May is 83.5%
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to CME's "Fed Watch": The probability of the Fed keeping interest rates unchanged in May is 83.5%, and the probability of a 25 basis point rate cut is 16.5%. The probability of the Fed keeping interest rates unchanged by June is 27.1%, the probability of a cumulative 25 basis point rate cut is 61.7%, and the probability of a cumulative 50 basis point rate cut is 11.1%. (Jinshi)

data.title: The annual rate of US CPI in March was 2.4%
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: The annual rate of the US CPI in March was 2.4%, the previous value was 2.80% and the expected value was 2.60% (Jinshi)

data.title: The number of initial jobless claims in the United States for the week ending April 5 was 223,000
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: The number of initial jobless claims in the United States for the week ending April 5 was 223,000, the previous value was 219,000, and the expected value was 223,000. (Jinshi)

data.title: VanEck Files Avalanche ETF Application with SEC
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: VanEck submitted an application to the SEC to list the Avalanche ETF on the Nasdaq. (Solid Intel)

data.title: BitMart will list WayFinder (PROMPT)
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to the official announcement, BitMart will launch WayFinder (PROMPT) at 22:00 (Eastern Time Zone 8) on April 10, and the PROMPT/USDT trading pair will be opened.

data.title: Binance Alpha Launches FHE
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: According to the official interface, Binance Alpha has launched FHE.

data.title: Crypto Insurance Firm Meanwhile Secures $40 Million in Series A Funding
data.description:
According to BlockBeats, crypto insurance company Meanwhile has successfully raised $40 million in a Series A funding round. The investment was led by Framework Ventures and Fulgur Ventures, with participation from Xapo crypto bank founder Wences Casares.

Meanwhile offers life insurance policies that operate similarly to traditional life insurance. Policyholders pay monthly premiums calculated by actuaries. However, instead of using bank accounts or checks, payments are made through Bitcoin wallets. In the event of the policyholder's death, beneficiaries receive the payout in Bitcoin.
